scripts.test-project-remove-local-swagger: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$project='./TypedApiTestProject/TypedApiTestProject.Server/TypedApiTestProject.Server.csproj'; dotnet package remove TypedApi.Swagger --project $project; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Host 'TypedApi.Swagger was not installed; continuing.'; exit 0 }"
scripts.test-project-clear-local-swagger: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$packagePath=Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE '.nuget\packages\typedapi.swagger\0.3.0'; Remove-Item $packagePath -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host ('Removed cached package: '+$packagePath)"
scripts.test-project-use-local-swagger: npm run test-project-remove-local-swagger && npm run test-project-clear-local-swagger && npm run test-project-add-local-swagger && npm run test-project-restore-local-swagger
scripts.test-project-reset-local-swagger: npm run test-project-pack-local-swagger && npm run test-project-use-local-swagger
scripts.nuget-swagger-pack-check: npm run nuget-swagger-clean && dotnet pack ./dotnet/TypedApi.Swagger/TypedApi.Swagger.csproj -c Release
scripts.test-client-update-local-package: npm run test-client-remove-local-package && npm run test-client-build-package && npm run test-client-pack-package && npm run test-client-install-local-package
scripts.test-client-full-reset: npm run test-client-update-local-package && npm run test-client-generate-api && npm run test-client-build
scripts.pack:check: cd ./npm/typed-api-client && npm run build && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.pack:local: cd ./npm/typed-api-client && npm run build && npm pack
scripts.publish:patch: npm run version:patch && npm run publish:check &&cd ./npm/typed-api-client && npm publish
scripts.publish:minor: npm run version:minor && npm run publish:check &&cd ./npm/typed-api-client && npm publish
scripts.publish:major: npm run version:major && npm run publish:check &&cd ./npm/typed-api-client && npm publish
